sky.football.uk.title: SPFL 25/26: Aberdeen v Celtic

sky.football.uk.description: With Championship leaders Coventry beginning to pull away, Kim Hellberg's Middlesbrough look to end a three-game winless run away to play-off outsiders Birmingham at St Andrew's. (02.03)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Santiago
sky.tennis.uk.description: Eyeing a maiden tour-level title, Yannick Hanfmann ends a six-year wait to play in an ATP Tour final as the 34-year-old German meets Santiago second seed Luciano Darderi of Italy. (01.03)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Merida
sky.tennis.uk.description: Competing for her first WTA 500 crown, Spain's Cristina Bucsa joins Polish number three Magdalena Frech to contest an unseeded Merida Open title match. (01.03)

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.tennis.uk.description: Andre Agassi and Pete Sampras met in the 2001 Indian Wells final - one of 34 career meetings. Agassi eyed a second consecutive win over Sampras in their first meeting in over a year.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.tennis.uk.description: In the 1996 Indian Wells final, Steffi Graf - having made her competitive return after a four-month injury layoff - would compete with Spain's Conchita Martinez for the title.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.tennis.uk.description: In a battle of generations, two of the all-time greats Roger Federer and Andre Agassi fought for the year-end championship in 2003. Federer was aiming for his first title on American soil.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.tennis.uk.description: Meeting for the first time in a final at tour level, the Williams sisters Venus and Serena went toe to toe in an emotionally charged contest for the Miami Open title.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.tennis.uk.description: In their first ever match in what would become a trophy-laden rivalry, Roger Federer - the then world number one - encountered Rafael Nadal in the third round of the 2004 Miami Open.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.tennis.uk.description: In the match that resulted in Serena Williams' 14-year boycott of Indian Wells, the 19-year-old fought Kim Clijsters in front of a volatile crowd - ultimately clinching her second title.

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Doha
sky.tennis.uk.description: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: ATP Final: Acapulco
sky.tennis.uk.description: Frances Tiafoe targets a first ATP title since 2023 as the American meets fifth seed Flavio Cobolli in the Acapulco final. Tiafoe leads the pair's head-to-head record 2-0. (28.02)

sky.tennis.uk.title: WTA Final: Austin

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig

E4Plus1.uk.description: Mr Santiago: Peralta goes to extremes to impress Santiago's dad at Thanksgiving dinner. Holt helps Pimento deal with life after the NYPD. (S4 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Skyfire Cycle: When a famous author receives death threats, Peralta and Jeffords take the case so that Jeffords can meet his lifelong literary hero. (S4 Ep8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer and Lisa Exchange Cross Words: Lisa discovers that she has a knack for crosswords and enters a tournament. But Homer thinks he can make money by betting on her to lose. (S20 Ep6/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Computer Wore Menace Shoes: After Homer publishes damaging rumours on 'Mr X's Web Page', he ends up on a Prisoner-style island, complete with guest star Patrick McGoohan. (S12 Ep6/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Yippee Ki Yay Melon Farmer: Barry is thrilled about celebrating Christmas at Lainey's house. Marvin makes a big promise to Adam. (S6 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Wedding Singer: Beverly's excited about Barry and Lainey's impending nuptials, but is the groom starting to have second thoughts? (S6 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Game of Chicken: Gloria tries to secretly baptise the twins before Haley and Dylan get home. Cam is at war with his school's mascot. Claire deals with the closet fiasco fallout. (S11 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Last Thanksgiving: Cameron and Mitchell's friends mistakenly assume they've split up - and they've definitely chosen a side. And Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner. (S11 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Cop-Con: The squad visit the annual Cop-Con event. It's usually an excuse for a party, but Captain Holt spoils the fun by telling them to be on their best behaviour. (S4 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Chasing Amy: Santiago vanishes hours before her sergeant's exam. Can Peralta and Diaz find her and bring her back before it's too late? (S4 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Hungry Hungry Homer: Homer goes on hunger strike when he discovers that the Springfield Isotopes baseball team are planning to move to Albuquerque. (S12 Ep15/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bye Bye Nerdy: When she gets bullied by a new girl at school, Lisa discovers that there's a 'nerd scent' that attracts bullies to nerds. So she invents an antidote. (S12 Ep16/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: Vicky and Prince form a bond. Donny's family support him as he faces the truth. And buried tensions begin to thaw.

E4Plus1.uk.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
E4Plus1.uk.description: Self-proclaimed icon Ella Morgan hosts a 'night of a thousand icons' with a decadent menu - that she's never cooked before! (Ep3/5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: James McAvoy, Anne-Marie, David Baddiel and Dame Kelly Holmes make decorative tarts and a savoury technical, and render their spirit animals in cake. (S4 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time: I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown, Family Fortunes, Love Is Blind, Mammals and This Morning. (S20 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers have been watching The Crown, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, and The Hidden Lives of Pets. (S20 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Series one favourite Rajan returns to the restaurant, hoping to be fourth time lucky. Will his chat-up lines impress Corinne, who has a history of meeting the wrong men? (S2 Ep3/8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction
E4Plus1.uk.description: Pansexual Sarah can't wait to road test her new body on her first date as a woman. Plumber Jamie's love life has gone down the u-bend, so he's all cisterns go to find a partner. (S11 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time: I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown, Family Fortunes, Love Is Blind, Mammals and This Morning. (S20 Ep11) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers have been watching The Crown, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, and The Hidden Lives of Pets. (S20 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Cop-Con: The squad visit the annual Cop-Con event. It's usually an excuse for a party, but Captain Holt spoils the fun by telling them to be on their best behaviour. (S4 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Chasing Amy: Santiago vanishes hours before her sergeant's exam. Can Peralta and Diaz find her and bring her back before it's too late? (S4 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Crazy Calls: Murray and Pop-Pop get answering machines but then wage a message war on each other. Beverly worries when Adam befriends some computer geeks. (S4 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stefan King: Adam gets into trouble with Beverly for portraying her as a monster in a horror story, and Erica forces Barry to go to a Halloween costume dance with her. (S4 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
E4Plus1.uk.description: High-flying groom Kev sits down with his bride Trish to remember one of the most turbulent weddings in Don't Tell the Bride history. (Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Moving Day: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own when they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. (S10 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Blasts from the Past: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before becoming grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mum, who has an interesting past. (S10 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Anna Vincenzo's: Gordon Ramsay visits Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's in Florida, where owner CeCe has lost her way in the kitchen. But can she take constructive criticism? (S3 Ep9) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Mama Rita's: Gordon tries to bring new ideas to Mama Rita's Mexican restaurant in Newbury Park, southern California. (S3 Ep10) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: You Got Zuko'd: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns from her summer in New York but acts like a different person. Beverly is unhappy with Lainey's culinary skills. (S6 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Rad!: Erica thinks her singing dreams have come true when she lands a job at a new karaoke bar in town. Murray teaches Barry and Lainey financial responsibility. (S6 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Can't Elope: Haley and Dylan's plan to quietly elope before the babies are born does not go as hoped. Jay tries to get his new business off the ground by courting an Insta celeb. (S10 Ep20)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Commencement: Cam finally gets a chance to shine when he's asked to preside over the high school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address. (S10 Ep21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Le Bistro: Gordon visits high-end Le Bistro in Florida. Owner Andy has cooked for top chefs in the past, but he's lost his passion - and he doesn't respond well to criticism. (S3 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gordon Returns 1: Gordon revisits three restaurants - Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl - to check in with the owners he helped. Has his advice been put to good use? (S3 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Overmining: Peralta and Holt help CJ with a big, problematic case. Jeffords tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. (S4 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Captain Latvia: Boyle enlists Peralta's help to track down his son's favourite toy for Christmas. The team face their rivals in the annual carol competition. (S4 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Mypods and Broomsticks: Homer suspects that Bart's new friend's Muslim family are terrorists. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes addicted to downloading songs on her new Mypod. (S20 Ep7/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Skinner's Sense of Snow: When a huge snowdrift engulfs the school, Bart leads the kids in a rebellion, gagging Principal Skinner and tying him to a chair as they run amok. (S12 Ep8/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Pina Colada Episode: Murray and Geoff try to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery after Lainey's departure. Coach Nick returns to town. (S6 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: I Coulda Been a Lawyer: Beverly campaigns for a new stop sign on the street. Barry panics about his college applications, and Murray's attempt to help makes things worse. (S6 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Tree's a Crowd: The Dunphy home is bursting when Dylan's hippie mum moves in and Claire's stepdad wants to visit. Jay and Gloria try to help Manny get over his breakup. (S11 Ep8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Last Christmas: Cameron hopes to keep everyone happy for Christmas dinner, but Mitchell thinks he has an ulterior motive. Meanwhile, Claire tries to dodge Jay's job offer. (S11 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Your Honor: Captain Holt's mother seeks help from the precinct. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre. (S4 Ep19)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Slaughterhouse: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins, after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. (S4 Ep20)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Simpson Safari: The Simpsons win a holiday to Africa. But when Homer enrages a hippo, the trip soon becomes a dangerous adventure... (S12 Ep17/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Trilogy of Error: Homer gets his thumb sliced off while trying to steal a brownie. Lisa misses the school bus. Bart discovers Fat Tony's stash of smuggled fireworks. (S12 Ep18/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Star of the Backstage: Marge gets nostalgic about her days as stage manager of her high school play and reunites the cast for a re-run. They say you should never go back... (S33 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
E4Plus1.uk.description: Paul Liba hosts a sports-themed night with a riotous dessert, where everyone has to eat their pudding while wearing boxing gloves. Will his menu pack a punch? (Ep4/5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Stacey Dooley, Jade Thirlwall, KSI and Katherine Ryan make cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies and create a showstopping biscuit and meringue scene. (S4 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time, The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne and You Won't Believe This. (S20 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Can metrosexual Jon find headstrong Mancunian Regan's soft side? Playboy Mostafa believes every girl would like to marry him. And heavy-metal fan Dan returns to the restaurant. (S2 Ep4/8)

Film4.uk.title: The Menu
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

Film4.uk.title: Rocketman
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Taron Egerton is Elton John in Dexter Fletcher's sequins-and-all biopic musical drama. With Jamie Bell as lyricist Bernie Taupin and Stephen Graham as Dick James.

Film4.uk.title: Enduring Love
Film4.uk.description: (2004) In Roger Michell's drama, when Daniel Craig and Rhys Ifans witness a fatal ballooning accident, it arouses a violent obsession in one for the other. Strong language/violence.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Magnificent Obsession
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

Film4.uk.title: The Frogmen
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

Film4.uk.title: It Should Happen to You
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

Film4.uk.title: Destination Gobi
Film4.uk.description: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

Film4.uk.title: Entrapment
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

Film4.uk.title: Orphan: First Kill
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

Film4.uk.title: Alita: Battle Angel
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

Film4.uk.title: Mean Streets
Film4.uk.description: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Leave Her to Heaven
Film4.uk.description: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

Film4.uk.title: Halls of Montezuma
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

Film4.uk.title: Sailor of the King
Film4.uk.description: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

Film4.uk.title: Tomahawk
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

Film4.uk.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
Film4.uk.description: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

Film4.uk.title: The Creator
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4.uk.title: A Hidden Life
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Send Me No Flowers
Film4.uk.description: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

Film4.uk.title: Gunman's Walk
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

Film4.uk.title: Patton
Film4.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

Film4.uk.title: Reality
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

Film4.uk.title: Salt
Film4.uk.description: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Entrapment
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Orphan: First Kill
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Alita: Battle Angel
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Mean Streets
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4Plus1.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4Plus1.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Leave Her to Heaven
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Halls of Montezuma
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Sailor of the King
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Tomahawk
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

Film4Plus1.uk.title: The Creator
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: A Hidden Life
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4Plus1.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4Plus1.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Send Me No Flowers
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Gunman's Walk
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Patton
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Bridge of Spies
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Reality
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Salt
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

SkyMix.uk.description: Bloodlines: A Ferengi plans to avenge the death of his son by killing Picard's son.

SkyMix.uk.title: Primeval
SkyMix.uk.description: Concrete Menagerie: Stephen reluctantly helps Lester capture a Silurian scorpion. The conspiracy unravels and people working on the project die - or do they? Season finale. (S2, ep 7)

SkyMix.uk.title: Band Of Brothers
SkyMix.uk.description: Carentan: An uncomfortable truth resonates for the Easy Company as they battle on against the Germans, their injuries and their fears. Contains flashing images. (3 of 10)

SkyMix.uk.title: Band Of Brothers
SkyMix.uk.description: Replacements: A rest in England prepares Easy Co and their replacements for a mission. An attack serves as a sobering initiation for the new recruits. Contains flashing images. (4 of 10)

SkyMix.uk.title: Grimm
SkyMix.uk.description: El Cuegle: As Nick and Hank investigate the kidnapping of a baby boy, a young family are terrorised by a frightening new Wesen. (S6, ep 4)

UAndW.uk.description: Another visit to the maternity ward at Liverpool Women's Hospital. Childhood friends Karra and Danny await the arrival of their third child. S9 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: One Born Every Minute
UAndW.uk.description: Maternity series which pulls on the heartstrings. Meet two dads-to-be who want to overcome their difficult upbringings by creating blissful childhoods for their sons. S4 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Gambling in Las Vegas
UAndW.uk.description: Amiable everyman Louis Theroux explores the casino culture of Las Vegas. Meeting many of the local characters, Louis casts a wry eye over the gambling-obsessed city.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: A Place For Paedophiles
UAndW.uk.description: Louis gains access to Coalinga State Hospital in California, which houses more than 500 convicted paedophiles - most of whom have been deemed unsafe for release.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: A trio of contestants have their fingers crossed for a big win on The Wheel, with DJ Tony Blackburn, scientist Maggie Aderin-Pocock and choirmaster Gareth Malone guiding them on. S1 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: MasterChef Australia
UAndW.uk.description: Internationally renowned trailblazer chef Clare Smyth from Oncore in Sydney tests the contestants with a beef and oyster dish. S15 Ep37

UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine. S10 Ep154

UAndW.uk.description: Scunthorpe: Nick Knowles and a band of volunteers renovate the home of Caroline Blanchard, a place that has been the site of two heart-wrenching tragedies. S31 Ep3
